subject: Clawhauser from Zootopia, an anthropomorphic cheetah in a grey detective suit and hat holding a donut with a wide delighted grin
description: A large, round anthropomorphic cheetah in a grey double-breasted suit and wide-brimmed detective hat stands in a confident pose, holding a donut in one raised hand. The figure's face has a wide grin and bright expression, radiating cheerful energy. Spotted cheetah markings are visible on the face and hands. Papers scatter in the air around the figure. The background is a dimly lit purple-blue urban or indoor environment with indistinct shapes suggesting a detective's workplace. The overall composition is slightly low-angle, making the figure read as large and boisterous. The mood is comedic and enthusiastic.
foreground: large anthropomorphic cheetah in grey suit and hat, holding a donut, wide grin, papers scattering
background: dimly lit purple-blue urban or office interior
emotion: wide delighted grin — enthusiastic and guileless, pure joy
